sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42929" key="*(esperiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Ἑσπερ-ικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>,=sq.: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Ἑ. μῆλον,</foreign>=<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κίτριον,</foreign> Juba <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg9010.tlg001:24" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">24</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
